languages.text: "Труд во славу Императора — долг каждого человека. Не все умеют нести это бремя и не роптать. Он нес, а потому праведен".
"Toiling for the glory of the Emperor is the duty of every person. Not everyone knows how to bear this burden without complaint. He bore it well, and thus he is righteous."
languages.original_text: "Труд во славу Императора — долг каждого человека. Не все умеют нести это бремя и не роптать. Он нес, а потому праведен".

traits.locale_text: "Toiling for the glory of the Emperor is the duty of every person. Not everyone knows how to bear this burden without complaint. He bore it well, and thus he is righteous."
"Toiling for the glory of the Emperor is the duty of every person. Not everyone knows how to bear this burden without complaint. He bore it well, and thus he is righteous."
"Toiling for the glory of the Emperor is the duty of every person. Not everyone knows how to bear this burden without complaint. He bore it well, and thus he is righteous."

languages.text: 「天皇の栄光のために働くことは、すべての人の義務である。この義務を苦もなく負うことを知っている人は、必ずしも多くはない。彼はそれをよく負ったからこそ、彼は正しいのだ」
languages.original_text: "Toiling for the glory of the Emperor is the duty of every person. Not everyone knows how to bear this burden without complaint. He bore it well, and thus he is righteous."

traits.locale_text: 「天皇の栄光のために働くことは、すべての人の義務である。この義務を苦もなく負うことを知っている人は、必ずしも多くはない。彼はそれをよく負ったからこそ、彼は正しいのだ。」

languages.text: “为帝皇的荣耀而苦干，是所有人的职责。可并非所有人都能毫无怨言地承担此等重任。他做得很好，所以他是正义的。”
languages.original_text: "Toiling for the glory of the Emperor is the duty of every person. Not everyone knows how to bear this burden without complaint. He bore it well, and thus he is righteous."

traits.locale_text: “为帝皇的荣耀而苦干，是所有人的职责。可并非所有人都能毫无怨言地承担此等重任。他做得很好，所以他是正义的。”

languages.text: «Trabajar por la gloria del Emperador es el deber de todo ser humano, pero no todos saben sobrellevar esta carga sin queja alguna. Él la llevó con dignidad, y eso le hace virtuoso».
languages.original_text: "Toiling for the glory of the Emperor is the duty of every person. Not everyone knows how to bear this burden without complaint. He bore it well, and thus he is righteous."

traits.locale_text: «Trabajar por la gloria del Emperador es el deber de todo ser humano, pero no todos saben sobrellevar esta carga sin queja alguna. Él la llevó con dignidad, y eso le hace virtuoso».

languages.text: "Nach dem Ruhm des Imperators zu streben, ist unser aller Pflicht. Nicht jeder weiß diese Bürde klaglos zu tragen. Er hat genau das getan, deshalb ist er rechtschaffen."
languages.original_text: "Toiling for the glory of the Emperor is the duty of every person. Not everyone knows how to bear this burden without complaint. He bore it well, and thus he is righteous."

traits.locale_text: "Nach dem Ruhm des Imperators zu streben, ist unser aller Pflicht. Nicht jeder weiß diese Bürde klaglos zu tragen. Er hat genau das getan, deshalb ist er rechtschaffen."

languages.text: « Nous avons tous le devoir de travailler pour la gloire de l'Empereur, mais certains ne sont pas capables de porter ce fardeau sans se plaindre. Cet homme a assumé le sien admirablement et c'est ce qui fait sa valeur. »
languages.original_text: "Toiling for the glory of the Emperor is the duty of every person. Not everyone knows how to bear this burden without complaint. He bore it well, and thus he is righteous."

traits.locale_text: « Nous avons tous le devoir de travailler pour la gloire de l'Empereur, mais certains ne sont pas capables de porter ce fardeau sans se plaindre. Cet homme a assumé le sien admirablement et c'est ce qui fait sa valeur. »

languages.text: "İmparator'un şanı için çalışmak herkesin vazifesidir. Herkes bu yükü şikâyet etmeden nasıl taşıyacağını bilemez. O bunu iyi taşımış, bu yüzden de doğruluk onda mevcut."
languages.original_text: "Toiling for the glory of the Emperor is the duty of every person. Not everyone knows how to bear this burden without complaint. He bore it well, and thus he is righteous."

traits.locale_text: "İmparator'un şanı için çalışmak herkesin vazifesidir. Herkes bu yükü şikâyet etmeden nasıl taşıyacağını bilemez. O bunu iyi taşımış, bu yüzden de doğruluk onda mevcut."
